tagline: Building scalable full stack web applications with React, Node.js, and modern cloud integrations.
description: Full Stack Developer specializing in React.js, Node.js, Express.js, Next.js, and MySQL — delivering responsive interfaces, REST APIs, and production-ready team collaboration platforms.

roles.detailed: Associate Software Developer | Full Stack Developer

bio: Full Stack Developer with experience designing and building scalable web applications using React.js, Node.js, Express.js, Next.js, Prisma, and MySQL. Skilled in REST API development, JWT authentication, role-based access control, AWS S3 integration, and third-party platform synchronization. Currently developing TaskWagon at Ennem Marketing Pvt. Ltd., a team collaboration and task management platform with employee portal, attendance, and HR modules.

experience.role: Associate Software Developer / Full Stack Developer
bullets: Developing and maintaining TaskWagon, a team collaboration and task management platform.
Implementing task assignment, tracking, and workflow management features.
Building responsive user interfaces using React.js and modern web technologies.
Integrating ClickUp for synchronization of spaces, folders, lists, tasks, subtasks, and attachments.
Managing employee portal, attendance management, HR modules, and role-based access control.
Implementing AWS S3 integration for secure file and image storage.
experience.desc: Full stack development of TaskWagon — team collaboration, HR modules, ClickUp sync, and AWS S3 file storage.

bullets: Developed and maintained scalable web applications using React, Node.js, and Express.js.
Optimized RESTful APIs and implemented JWT-based authentication with role-based authorization.
Designed and optimized database schemas using MySQL and MongoDB.
Built reusable UI components and integrated third-party APIs with robust error handling.
Participated in Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and code reviews.
experience.desc: Full stack development for Hub-Talent-Acquisition, an internal recruitment management platform with MVC architecture.

bullets: Gained hands-on exposure to frontend development processes and production workflows.
Contributed to responsive web interfaces and collaborated with the development team.
Demonstrated punctuality, dedication, and a strong willingness to learn new technologies.
experience.desc: Frontend development internship focused on building modern, responsive web application interfaces.

projects.title: TaskWagon
projects.subtitle: Team Collaboration & Task Management
projects.desc: A team collaboration and task management platform with task assignment, workflow tracking, employee portal, attendance management, HR modules, role-based access control, and ClickUp synchronization for spaces, folders, lists, tasks, and attachments.

projects.title: Hub-Talent-Acquisition
projects.subtitle: Recruitment Management Platform
projects.desc: An internal recruitment management platform featuring job posting, approval workflows, candidate tracking, and role-based access control for Admin and HR roles, built with MVC architecture and automated email notifications.

publications.title: B.E. Computer Science and Engineering
publications.desc: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science and Engineering from Sasurie College of Engineering, Anna University, Tirupur. CGPA: 7.79 (2019–2023).

publications.title: Full Stack Development Course
publications.desc: Comprehensive full stack development training covering React.js, Node.js, Express.js, and database-driven application development (Aug 2024 – Jan 2025).

publications.title: Full Stack with Java Training
publications.desc: Certificate of completion for Full Stack with Java training program. Credential ID: BDZOMR86903, issued January 2024.

publications.title: Web Development Internship
publications.desc: Internship completion in Web Development (Sep – Oct 2022). Certificate ID: TNINTC22-772, issued August 2023.
